title: The AI ‘Memory Wall’ Is About to Get a Lot Taller: These 3 Stocks Will Win Big
excerpt: Nvidia's GPUs keep getting faster, but a deeper problem is quietly throttling AI's progress and reshaping where the next wave of infrastructure spending land...
content_html:
Rich Duprey

Sun, July 19, 2026 at 5:21 AM PDT 4 min read

Quick Read

  • Morgan Stanley projects memory will grow from 12% to 40% of cloud infrastructure spending by 2030, making it AI's defining new bottleneck.

  • SK Hynix commands over 50% of the advanced HBM market, while Micron closes the gap with long-term hyperscale HBM supply agreements.

  • Marvell's CXL memory expansion technology targets a chip market set to double to $2.1 billion, with 75% of revenue tied to data centers.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Micron Technology didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Artificial intelligence has been defined by a relentless race for more computing power. Nvidia's (NASDAQ:NVDA) GPUs became the stars of that story because they delivered the horsepower needed to train ever-larger AI models. But every technology boom eventually runs into a new constraint. 

According to a recent Morgan Stanley report, that next hurdle isn't computing power -- it's memory. As AI models grow larger and inference workloads become more demanding, data centers need far more memory bandwidth and capacity to keep expensive accelerators fed with data. That shift could reshape where hundreds of billions of dollars in AI infrastructure spending flows over the rest of the decade.

The Memory Wall Is Becoming AI's Biggest Challenge

Morgan Stanley argues memory is becoming the new bottleneck for AI systems, a phenomenon long known in computing as the "memory wall." GPUs continue getting faster, but they spend more time waiting for data to arrive from memory rather than performing calculations.

The numbers help explain why this matters. Morgan Stanley estimates memory will account for roughly 40% of cloud and data center capital spending by 2030, up from only about 12% today. That increase reflects growing demand across several categories:

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Micron Technology didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Memory Segment

Primary AI Role

Leading Companies

High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM)

Feeds AI accelerators with massive data throughput

SK Hynix (NASDAQ:SKHY), Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU), Samsung

Server DRAM (DDR5+)

Expands memory capacity for inference and larger AI models

SK Hynix, Micron, Samsung

CXL Memory Expansion

Pools and expands memory across AI servers

Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL), SK Hynix, Micron

NAND Flash Storage

Stores AI datasets and checkpoints

SK Hynix, Micron, Samsung

Let's put that into perspective. Every dollar hyperscalers spend on AI servers increasingly requires another dollar supporting the memory ecosystem. That broadens the investment opportunity well beyond GPU manufacturers.

content_html_zh:
里奇·杜普雷

太平洋夏令时间 2026 年 7 月 19 日星期日上午 5:21 阅读 4 分钟

快速阅读

  • 摩根士丹利预计，到 2030 年，内存占云基础设施支出的比例将从 12% 增长到 40%，这将使其成为人工智能的新瓶颈。
  • SK 海力士占据了先进 HBM 市场 50% 以上的份额，而美光则通过长期超大规模 HBM 供应协议缩小了差距。
  • Marvell 的 CXL 内存扩展技术瞄准的芯片市场将翻一番，达到 21 亿美元，其中 75% 的收入来自数据中心。
  • 立即行动：2010 年致电 NVIDIA 的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而美光科技 (Micron Technology) 却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

人工智能的定义是对更多计算能力的不懈竞争。 Nvidia（纳斯达克股票代码：NVDA）的 GPU 成为了这个故事的明星，因为它们提供了训练更大的人工智能模型所需的马力。 但每一次技术繁荣最终都会遇到新的限制。

根据摩根士丹利最近的一份报告，下一个障碍不是计算能力，而是内存。 随着人工智能模型变得越来越大，推理工作负载的要求越来越高，数据中心需要更多的内存带宽和容量来为昂贵的加速器提供数据。 这种转变可能会重塑未来十年数千亿美元的人工智能基础设施支出的流向。

记忆墙正在成为人工智能最大的挑战

摩根士丹利认为，内存正在成为人工智能系统的新瓶颈，这种现象在计算领域长期以来被称为“内存墙”。 GPU 的速度越来越快，但它们花费更多时间等待数据从内存到达，而不是执行计算。

这些数字有助于解释为什么这很重要。 摩根士丹利估计，到 2030 年，内存将占云和数据中心资本支出的约 40%，而目前仅占 12% 左右。 这一增长反映出几个类别的需求不断增长：

立即行动：2010 年致电 NVIDIA 的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而美光科技 (Micron Technology) 却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

内存段人工智能的主要角色领先企业
高带宽内存 (HBM)为人工智能加速器提供海量数据吞吐量SK 海力士（纳斯达克股票代码：SKHY）、美光科技（纳斯达克股票代码：MU）、三星
服务器 DRAM (DDR5+)扩展推理和更大人工智能模型的内存容量SK 海力士、美光、三星
CXL 内存扩展跨 AI 服务器池化和扩展内存Marvell Technology（纳斯达克股票代码：MRVL）、SK 海力士、美光
NAND闪存存储 AI 数据集和检查点SK 海力士、美光、三星

让我们正确看待这一点。 超大规模企业在人工智能服务器上花费的每一美元都越来越需要另一美元来支持内存生态系统。 这扩大了 GPU 制造商之外的投资机会。
